overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt riding his horse through a stormy forest at night, transitioning through a rural village and crossing a stone bridge toward a castle. The footage features dramatic lightning, medieval architecture, and atmospheric blue-green lighting.

events.description: lightning flash illuminates the storm clouds ahead
bright lightning strike visible through the trees

agents.ego_description: galloping on horseback along a narrow dirt path surrounded by dense pine forest

entered.detail: dense evergreen trees lining both sides of the forest path
narrow winding dirt trail through the forest
dark turbulent clouds with visible lightning flashes

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark forest trail at night during a thunderstorm. The camera follows Geralt riding his horse at a gallop along a narrow dirt path flanked by tall pine trees. Lightning periodically illuminates the storm clouds overhead, casting brief flashes of light across the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural village outskirts with wooden farmhouses

events.description: exiting dense forest into open village area with wooden structures
lightning flash reveals castle towers in the distance

agents.ego_description: riding through the village outskirts, navigating past wooden fences and farmhouses

entered.detail: traditional wooden village houses with thatched or shingled roofs
rustic wooden post fences lining the road

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from dense forest to open village outskirts. Wooden farmhouses and fences appear along the widening dirt road. The sky remains stormy with occasional lightning revealing distant castle towers. The vegetation becomes sparse as the character rides toward the settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval stone bridge with burning braziers

events.description: horse steps onto cobblestone surface of the stone bridge
passing pedestrians standing on the right side of the bridge

agents.ego_description: crossing the stone bridge toward the castle, passing other travelers

notable_agents.action: two villagers standing by the bridge railing, observing the rider

entered.detail: arched medieval stone bridge with parapet walls
lit fire braziers mounted on stone pillars along the bridge
tall stone towers and battlements of the approaching fortress
rough cobblestone paving of the bridge surface

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character crossing a medieval stone bridge paved with cobblestones. Burning braziers line both sides of the bridge, casting warm light against the cool storm atmosphere. The castle towers loom ahead in the distance, and a few NPC pedestrians stand by the bridge railing as the rider passes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, storm-lashed forest into the illuminated outskirts of a medieval settlement. It begins on a narrow dirt trail where Geralt gallops through dense pine trees under a dark sky periodically fractured by flashes of lightning. As the forest thins, the scene opens into the village outskirts, where the vegetation becomes sparse and wooden farmhouses and fences emerge along a widening road. The camera then follows the rider onto a cobblestone stone bridge lined with burning braziers that cast a warm glow against the cool, stormy atmosphere. Finally, the view expands to reveal pedestrians by the railing and the looming silhouette of castle towers in the distance.
